hpa.description: Enables autoscaling through Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler. Defaults to false.
Enables autoscaling through Kubernetes Horizontal Pod Autoscaler. Defaults to false.

browserTraffic.description: Enables additional load generation through simulated Chrome browsers. Defaults to false.

userSpawnRate.description: Per second user creation rate. Defaults to 5.

users.description: Initial number of simulated users. Defaults to 50.
